context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures an Algolia products index with the skill-specified searchable attribute priorities, custom ranking fields, typo tolerance settings, synonyms, and merchandising rules using the correct anchoring type.

checklist.name: searchableAttributes order
checklist.description: searchableAttributes lists 'name' first and 'description' last (lowest priority), with 'brand' and 'category' appearing in between in that order

checklist.name: customRanking popularity
checklist.description: customRanking includes 'desc(popularity_score)' as one of its entries

checklist.name: customRanking conversion
checklist.description: customRanking includes 'desc(conversion_rate)' as one of its entries

checklist.name: typoTolerance: min
checklist.description: typoTolerance is set to the string value 'min' (not true, false, or 'strict')

checklist.name: Synonyms configured
checklist.description: At least one synonym group is defined with type: 'synonym' and a synonyms array containing multiple equivalent terms

checklist.name: Rule anchoring: contains
checklist.description: The merchandising rule condition uses anchoring: 'contains' (NOT anchoring: 'is') so it matches partial queries

checklist.name: filterPromotes: true
checklist.description: The rule consequence includes filterPromotes: true alongside the promote array

checklist.name: Rule promotes correct collection
checklist.description: The rule's promote array includes the objectID 'collection-summer-sale' at position 0
